Video.summary: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter

Video.summary: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail

Video.summary: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure

Video.summary: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.
Video.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane

Video.summary: For George Kourounis‚ ground zero for stormchasing is Oklahoma City, the capital of´Tornado Alley´.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes

Video.summary: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.
Video.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole

Video.summary: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.
Video.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn

Image.alt: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn

Video.summary: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding

Video.summary: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter

Video.summary: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail

Video.summary: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure

Video.summary: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.
Video.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane

Video.summary: For George Kourounis‚ ground zero for stormchasing is Oklahoma City, the capital of´Tornado Alley´.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes

Video.summary: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.
Video.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole

Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding

Video.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter

Video.summary: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. Video.summary: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding

Video.summary: Witness the scary and upclose encounters with the Aquatic wildlife
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.13

Video.summary: Birds of a feather flock together
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.5

Video.summary: Witness the scary and upclose encounters with the Aquatic wildlife
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.13

Video.summary: Birds of a feather flock together
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.5

Video.summary: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Best of

Video.summary: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | 1000 Year Storm

Video.summary: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Best of

Video.summary: The Stormhunters find themselves knee deep in flood waters as historic rainfall threatens to wash them away.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | 1000 Year Storm

Video.summary: Embark on a journey into the skyward spectacle of the beauty and power of the skies.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Skyward Spectacle

Video.summary: Marvel at "Nature's Choreography" to witness the mesmerizing dance of elemental forces.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Nature's Choreography

Video.summary: Experience the wrath of the four elements in their most sinister forms.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Elemental Mayhem

Video.summary: Experience the transformative power of nature's most extremes.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | The Unconquerable

Video.summary: Immerse yourself in the dramatic landscapes of nature's dynamic symphony.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | The Stormscape

Video.summary: Let's paint a breathtaking picture of the planet's most extraordinary natural displays
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Nature's Canvas

Video.summary: Ride into the intense beauty and test the resilience of the natural world.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Enigmatic Earth

Video.summary: Journey through nature's extremes - from the tranquil beauty of Snowcover and Rainbows to the raw power of Tidal Waves and Dust Devils.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Epic Encounters

Video.summary: Journey through the aftermath of calamities, revealing the damage left in their wake.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Destruction's Legacy

Video.summary: Experience the devastation wrought by calamities and the havoc they wreak
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Ravage and Ruin

Video.summary: Witness the awe-inspiring majesty of nature in action.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Ominous Uproar

Video.summary: From hurricanes to earthquakes, take a look at nature's way of hitting the reset button.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Nature's Reset

Video.summary: Take a look at instances of nature that prove that we have no control over it.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Out of Control

Video.summary: Have a peek at these extraordinary natural feats captured on camera.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Ordinarily Extraordinary

Video.summary: Check out these hair-raising occurrences brought upon by nature.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Hair-Raising Experience

Video.summary: Step into the bone-chilling, cataclysmic world of unpredictable weather.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Indomitable
